languages.text: Несмотря на мрачную славу, сам полк просуществовал недолго: кровожадное безумие, захватившее души и умы меровцев, привело к расслоению дисциплины и междоусобной войне среди некогда преданных друг другу гвардейцев.

Despite its grim fame, the regiment itself did not last long: the bloodthirsty madness that had captured the souls and minds of the Merovians led to a breakdown of discipline and internecine warfare among the once loyal Guardsmen.
languages.original_text: Несмотря на мрачную славу, сам полк просуществовал недолго: кровожадное безумие, захватившее души и умы меровцев, привело к расслоению дисциплины и междоусобной войне среди некогда преданных друг другу гвардейцев.

traits.locale_text: Despite its grim fame, the regiment itself did not last long: the bloodthirsty madness that had captured the souls and minds of the Merovians led to a breakdown of discipline and internecine warfare among the once loyal Guardsmen.

Despite its grim fame, the regiment itself did not last long: the bloodthirsty madness that had captured the souls and minds of the Merovians led to a breakdown of discipline and internecine warfare among the once loyal Guardsmen.

Despite its grim fame, the regiment itself did not last long: the bloodthirsty madness that had captured the souls and minds of the Merovians led to a breakdown of discipline and internecine warfare among the once loyal Guardsmen.

languages.text: その恐ろしい名声にもかかわらず、その連隊は長くは続かなかった。メロヴィング朝の人々の魂と心を支配した血に飢えた狂気は、かつて忠実な衛兵だった彼らの中で、規律の崩壊と内乱を引き起こしたのだ。
languages.original_text: Despite its grim fame, the regiment itself did not last long: the bloodthirsty madness that had captured the souls and minds of the Merovians led to a breakdown of discipline and internecine warfare among the once loyal Guardsmen.

traits.locale_text: その恐ろしい名声にもかかわらず、その連隊は長くは続かなかった。メロヴィング朝の人々の魂と心を支配した血に飢えた狂気は、かつて忠実な衛兵だった彼らの中で、規律の崩壊と内乱を引き起こしたのだ。

languages.text: 尽管这个军团恶名昭彰，但它并未存续太久：攫取了梅罗夫人灵魂与心智的嗜血疯狂，最终导致军团纪律彻底崩溃，曾经忠诚的卫士们陷入内讧。
languages.original_text: Despite its grim fame, the regiment itself did not last long: the bloodthirsty madness that had captured the souls and minds of the Merovians led to a breakdown of discipline and internecine warfare among the once loyal Guardsmen.

traits.locale_text: 尽管这个军团恶名昭彰，但它并未存续太久：攫取了梅罗夫人灵魂与心智的嗜血疯狂，最终导致军团纪律彻底崩溃，曾经忠诚的卫士们陷入内讧。

languages.text: Malgré sa sombre réputation, le régiment lui-même ne dura guère longtemps : sa discipline finit par succomber à la folie sanguinaire qui s'était emparée de l'âme des Meroviens et des conflits intestins éclatèrent parmi les gardes impériaux autrefois loyaux.
languages.original_text: Despite its grim fame, the regiment itself did not last long: the bloodthirsty madness that had captured the souls and minds of the Merovians led to a breakdown of discipline and internecine warfare among the once loyal Guardsmen.

traits.locale_text: Malgré sa sombre réputation, le régiment lui-même ne dura guère longtemps : sa discipline finit par succomber à la folie sanguinaire qui s'était emparée de l'âme des Meroviens et des conflits intestins éclatèrent parmi les gardes impériaux autrefois loyaux.

languages.text: A pesar de su siniestra fama, el regimiento no duró mucho: la locura sanguinaria que había atenazado las almas y mentes de los merovianos condujo a la fractura de la disciplina y las luchas internas entre los Guardias antaño leales.
languages.original_text: Despite its grim fame, the regiment itself did not last long: the bloodthirsty madness that had captured the souls and minds of the Merovians led to a breakdown of discipline and internecine warfare among the once loyal Guardsmen.

traits.locale_text: A pesar de su siniestra fama, el regimiento no duró mucho: la locura sanguinaria que había atenazado las almas y mentes de los merovianos condujo a la fractura de la disciplina y las luchas internas entre los Guardias antaño leales.

languages.text: Acımasız ününe rağmen alayın kendisi uzun süre dayanamadı: Merovluların ruhlarını ve zihinlerini ele geçiren kana susamış delilik, bir zamanların sadık Muhafızları arasında disiplinin çökmesine ve iç savaş çıkmasına yol açtı.
languages.original_text: Despite its grim fame, the regiment itself did not last long: the bloodthirsty madness that had captured the souls and minds of the Merovians led to a breakdown of discipline and internecine warfare among the once loyal Guardsmen.

traits.locale_text: Acımasız ününe rağmen alayın kendisi uzun süre dayanamadı: Merovluların ruhlarını ve zihinlerini ele geçiren kana susamış delilik, bir zamanların sadık Muhafızları arasında disiplinin çökmesine ve iç savaş çıkmasına yol açtı.

languages.text: Trotz seines düsteren Ruhms hatte das Regiment selbst nicht lange Bestand. Der blutrünstige Wahnsinn, der Seele und Verstand der Merovianer erfasst hatte, führte zu Disziplinlosigkeit und einem Bruderkrieg der einst loyalen Gardisten.
languages.original_text: Despite its grim fame, the regiment itself did not last long: the bloodthirsty madness that had captured the souls and minds of the Merovians led to a breakdown of discipline and internecine warfare among the once loyal Guardsmen.

traits.locale_text: Trotz seines düsteren Ruhms hatte das Regiment selbst nicht lange Bestand. Der blutrünstige Wahnsinn, der Seele und Verstand der Merovianer erfasst hatte, führte zu Disziplinlosigkeit und einem Bruderkrieg der einst loyalen Gardisten.
